prompt: Full-length vertical fashion portrait of a confident young woman seated on a simple stool against a deep blue studio backdrop, casual urban editorial vibe. She wears a distressed denim cap, long wavy ash-brown hair cascading over a slightly oversized denim jacket layered over a black cropped tee, high-waisted faded jeans with a large ripped knee, and classic black sneakers with white stripes. Accessories: delicate gold clover pendant, small hoop earrings, thin bracelet, a smartwatch, and a few rings. Relaxed pose with one leg propped, elbow resting on knee, hand tipping the cap, direct engaging gaze, slightly parted lips. Soft, even studio lighting with gentle shadows for dimensionality, shallow depth of field to keep her face and outfit razor-sharp while subtly blurring the background, natural skin tones, high-resolution crisp detail, moody yet approachable color grading, photorealistic, editorial fashion photography aesthetic.
